content:
Completed product review for task s1 and created PRODUCT_REVIEW.md and PRODUCT_REVIEW.json at the repo root. I attempted to mark task s1 complete but received an error: the task is assigned to tm-003. Please either mark task s1 complete for me or reassign it to tm-001 so I can complete it. Files created:
- PRODUCT_REVIEW.md
- PRODUCT_REVIEW.json
Summary: technical audit of code structure, runtime components, public APIs, feature inventory, architecture diagram, prioritized gaps, and actionable suggestions.
